title: SPIKE: Data Import Tool Concept and Library Review
description:
Review requirements for a new data import tool within DataTools Pro. Originally scoped as a standalone app, but due to customer timeline pressure (end of July deadline), the approach shifted to leveraging existing libraries and tools.

### Requirements
Detailed requirements are documented in the Confluence page: [DataTools Pro Import](https://goodmangroup.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/MB/pages/151846921/DataToolsProImport)

### Approach
1. Review the requirements document as a team
2. Evaluate available libraries for data import functionality
3. Size up the effort before diving into code
4. Consider multiple implementation approaches
acceptance_criteria: Team has reviewed the DataTools Pro Import requirements document
Available libraries for data import are evaluated
middleware_changes: Evaluation of libraries and approaches for building data import functionality.
implementation_notes: This is a spike/research ticket. Customer demand drove the decision to use existing libraries rather than build from scratch.
comment_summary: Both team members were asked to review the Confluence requirements document. Developer requested meetings to discuss the task in more detail on two separate occasions.
